title: gtq-10-how-lies-kill

lossless_compression.reason: No live source file found for semantic addressing.

extracted_equations.text: = number of microstates compatible with the observed macrostate. Plain English: entropy counts how many distinct ways something could be arranged while still looking the same from the outside. 2. Truth as Zero-Entropy State
= total number of lies at generation

= compounding rate (avg. supporting lies required per lie). Plain English: one lie becomes two becomes four. Each generation multiplies. The growth is exponential, not linear. 5. Shannon Bound on Noisy Channels

BER = bit error rate; the fraction of transmitted bits that arrive corrupted. Channel Capacity = the maximum information rate that can be transmitted reliably (Shannon-Hartley theorem). Plain English: any uncorrected error rate, no matter how small, drives channel capacity to zero over infinite time. This is the formal mechanism behind “the wages of sin is death.” 6. The Eternity Bound

= number of steps (time). Plain English: 99.9999% accuracy still hits zero given infinite time. The only accuracy rate that survives eternity is 100%. This is why Revelation 21:27 says “nothing unclean will ever enter it” — the eternal channel requires zero noise. 7. Coherence Equilibrium (Canonical)

= sin (entropy injection). Plain English: from the canonical Chi Field Properties (D2.2). The balance between grace (error correction) and sin (noise injection) sets the steady-state coherence of any system. 8. Master Equation Decay Term

= the decay term (sin acts on existing coherence, scaling with how much there is to corrupt). Plain English: the noise-driven coherence loss term in the Master Equation (E2.1). Sin doesn't subtract a fixed amount — it subtracts a fraction. The richer the system, the larger the absolute loss. Glossary Key terms used in this article. Hover any underlined gold term in The Paper for the same definition. Entropy / Sin (

is reserved for the cosmological constant). Logos Coupling The interaction architecture between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — the channel structure that determines how the field acts on a node. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.) Grace (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
The Flood Hard reset — when error rate exceeds correction capacity, the system restarts from a clean state (Noah = preserved seed signal)

The interaction architecture between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — the channel structure that determines how the field acts on a node. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.)
